name: starlight-fsharp-literate
description: F# Literate (.fsx) file support for Astro Starlight

scripts.prepare: node --eval "if (process.env.CI || process.env.ACT) { console.log('Skipping husky install in CI/ACT environment'); process.exit(0); } require('child_process').execSync('dotnet husky install', {stdio: 'inherit'})"
